title: valeriana eriocarpa
intro: Valeriana eriocarpa, also known as Red Valerian, is a species of flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the western United States and is prized for its medicinal properties, including sedative and anti-anxiety effects due to its high concentration of valerenic acid and isovaleric acid. The plant has been used to alleviate insomnia, restlessness, and stress-related symptoms, and its health benefits include promoting relaxation, reducing muscle tension, and improving sleep quality. Valeriana eriocarpa is commonly prepared as a tincture, tea, or capsule, and its herbal preparations have been used in traditional medicine to support overall well-being and calm the nervous system.
